payload.answer: Slack is the sole guardrailed memory ingestion interface for Brain at this time. Telegram ingestion is prohibited unless escalation criteria are satisfied. All memory cards must align with this constraint.

entity_resolution.reason: Durable commitment to Slack as primary ingestion channel to prevent ambiguity in memory integrity. Telegram remains deferred unless escalation conditions are met.

memory_cards.statement: Slack must remain the primary guardrailed memory ingestion interface for Brain. All other channels (e.g., Telegram) are deferred to future phases unless explicitly approved via escalation.
Telegram ingestion may proceed only if: (1) Slack capacity is saturated, (2) explicit approval from project lead is granted, or (3) a formal phase-gate review is completed.

details: Locked Slack as primary ingestion channel.
Telegram ingestion deferred with escalation path defined.
Memory integrity preserved by rejecting superseded/deleted facts.
